function:
lt
, 
        lte
, 
        gt
, 
        gte
, 
        equ
, 
        neq
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, name VARCHAR(100), score FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, score, created_at) VALUES (1, 'example1', 12.5, NOW()), (2, 'example2', 20.0, NOW()), (3, 'example3', NULL, NOW()), (4, NULL, 30.0, NOW());
SELECT name, score FROM test_table WHERE lt(score, 25) AND bif:contains(name, 'example');
SELECT id, name FROM test_table AS t1 WHERE equ(t1.score, (SELECT MAX(t2.score) FROM test_table AS t2 WHERE t2.id != t1.id));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM test_table WHERE gte(score, 15) OR lt(score, NULL) GROUP BY name) AS grouped;
SELECT name, SUM(score) OVER (PARTITION BY name ORDER BY created_at) AS cumulative_score FROM test_table WHERE neq(score, NULL);
SELECT t1.name FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_table t2 ON lt(t1.score, t2.score) WHERE t1.id <> t2.id;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, name, score FROM test_table ORDER BY gte(score, 0.1) DESC) AS ordered_scores WHERE bif:contains(name, 'example');
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, score FROM test_table WHERE neq(name, NULL);
SELECT name FROM temp_table WHERE lt(atof(score), 15.0) OR gte(atof(score), ('20'::INTEGER + 5));
SELECT AVG(score) FROM test_table HAVING equ(AVG(score), (SELECT MAX(score) FROM test_table WHERE gte(score, 10)));
